title: aquilicia sambucina
intro: Aquilicia sambucina, also known as elderflower or Sambucus nigra, is a plant species belonging to the Adoxaceae family, commonly found in Europe, North America, and Asia. The plant's flowers and berries have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Aquilicia sambucina include relief from colds, flu, and fever, as well as support for the immune system and cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Aquilicia sambucina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the flowers and berries and then combining them with water or a solvent to create a medicinal extract.
